storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH020_SC003

## Production Intent
The scene focuses on the protagonist utilizing a new supernatural ability to mimic specific thought-waves to manipulate technology. The sequence requires high-tension mental exertion followed by a high-mobility physical escape through the Atmosphere Factory, transitioning from controlled industrial interiors to the open Wilderness.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- woola
- The Caretaker (Antagonistic presence)

## Required Environments
- Atmosphere Factory (Locks/Exits)
- Wilderness

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual representation of "mental" mimicry/thought-waves
- Speed and pacing of movement through facility locks/exits

## Beat List
- BT001: protagonist engages mental ability to mimic thought-waves at the Atmosphere Factory locks.
- BT002: protagonist bypasses facility locks via mental manipulation.
- BT003: protagonist and woola execute a rapid escape through the factory.
- BT004: protagonist and woola exit the facility into the Wilderness.
